arguments.new_str:
from django.db import models

class NotificationType:
    """Notification type constants for the notifications module."""
    INFO = 'INFO'
    WARNING = 'WARNING'
    ERROR = 'ERROR'
    SUCCESS = 'SUCCESS'
    PAYMENT = 'PAYMENT'
    SHIPMENT = 'SHIPMENT'
    REVIEW = 'REVIEW'
    
    CHOICES = [
        (INFO, 'Information'),
        (WARNING, 'Warning'),
        (ERROR, 'Error'),
        (SUCCESS, 'Success'),
        (PAYMENT, 'Payment'),
        (SHIPMENT, 'Shipment'),
        (REVIEW, 'Review'),
    ]

class Notification(models.Model):
    user_id = models.IntegerField()
    type = models.CharField(
        max_length=50,
        choices=NotificationType.CHOICES,
        help_text="Type of notification"
    )
    message = models.TextField()
    read = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    
    class Meta:
        ordering = ['-created_at']
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=['user_id', 'read']),
            models.Index(fields=['type', 'created_at']),
        ]
    
    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.type}: {self.message[:50]}"
    
    def mark_as_read(self):
        """Mark this notification as read."""
        self.read = True
        self.save(update_fields=['read'])

steps.thought: Now I'll update the handlers to support all the new notification types.

arguments.new_str:
from .models import NotificationType
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def handle_notification(notification):
    """Route notifications to appropriate handlers based on type.
    
    Args:
        notification: Notification instance to handle
    """
    handlers = {
        NotificationType.ERROR: handle_error_notification,
        NotificationType.WARNING: handle_warning_notification,
        NotificationType.INFO: handle_info_notification,
        NotificationType.SUCCESS: handle_success_notification,
        NotificationType.PAYMENT: handle_payment_notification,
        NotificationType.SHIPMENT: handle_shipment_notification,
        NotificationType.REVIEW: handle_review_notification,
    }
    
    handler = handlers.get(notification.type, handle_default_notification)
    handler(notification)

def handle_error_notification(notification):
    """Handle error notifications with email alerts."""
    logger.error(f'Error notification: {notification.message}')
    send_email_alert(notification)

def handle_warning_notification(notification):
    """Handle warning notifications with logging."""
    logger.warning(f'Warning notification: {notification.message}')
    log_warning(notification)

def handle_info_notification(notification):
    """Handle informational notifications."""
    logger.info(f'Info notification: {notification.message}')

def handle_success_notification(notification):
    """Handle success notifications with push notifications."""
    logger.info(f'Success notification: {notification.message}')
    # Send push notification to user
    send_push_notification(notification)

def handle_payment_notification(notification):
    """Handle payment-related notifications."""
    logger.info(f'Payment notification: {notification.message}')
    send_email_alert(notification)
    send_push_notification(notification)

def handle_shipment_notification(notification):
    """Handle shipment notifications with SMS and push."""
    logger.info(f'Shipment notification: {notification.message}')
    send_sms_notification(notification)
    send_push_notification(notification)

def handle_review_notification(notification):
    """Handle review notifications."""
    logger.info(f'Review notification: {notification.message}')
    send_push_notification(notification)

def handle_default_notification(notification):
    """Default handler for unknown notification types."""
    logger.warning(f'Unknown notification type: {notification.type}')

# Placeholder functions for various notification methods
def send_email_alert(notification):
    pass

def log_warning(notification):
    pass

def send_push_notification(notification):
    pass

def send_sms_notification(notification):
    pass

arguments.message: New notification types added successfully. Created NotificationType class in models.py with 7 notification types (INFO, WARNING, ERROR, SUCCESS, PAYMENT, SHIPMENT, REVIEW). Updated Notification model to use local type definitions instead of external constants. Implemented comprehensive handler routing in handlers.py with dedicated handler functions for each type. Added proper logging, database indexes, and helper methods. All changes contained within src/notifications/ directory.
